description: You are a district forester compiling a timber cruise for the 240-acre Elk Creek Unit. A 30-plot variable-radius cruise (BAF 20) was conducted. Using the raw tree measurements (~/Documents/Spreadsheets/elk_creek_cruise.csv), project parameters (~/Documents/project_info.txt), and local volume table (~/Documents/Spreadsheets/pnw_volume_table.csv), create a timber inventory workbook at ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/elk_creek_inventory.xlsx. The workbook must include expansion factors (TPA) and net volumes for each tree, summaries of standing volume, basal area, and TPA by species and 2-inch DBH class, and the grand total net volume for the

data_sources: Simulated Pacific Northwest Variable-Radius Timber Cruise
